planning_request.user_request: Turn 2 of a bounded three-turn PRD hardening discussion. This is a completed read-only reconciliation, not an implementation plan. Read the canonical PRD and the turn-1 synthesis. Decide which findings become P0 required PRD changes, which become P1 release-gated additions, and which remain post-MVP. Resolve contradictions without reopening confirmed D1-D6/C1. Return concise, concluded reconciliation findings only: accept/conditionally accept/reject each grouped proposal, exact contract language or section delta, and residual UNVERIFIED gates. Do not modify files.
planning_request.desired_outcome: A minimum robust delta that makes the Sloop-only browser MVP implementable and testable without inventing unvalidated sailing thresholds or browser performance numbers.
known_context: D1-D6 and C1 are confirmed and must remain intact.
constraints: do not create numeric sailing or performance assertions without source; make them validation gates
previous_review_findings: Turn-1 synthesis identifies deterministic contract, lesson contracts, scoring, domain gates, quality/release gates, local replay/data boundary, Korea label policy, and scope coherence.
